rPickle documentation
====================================

Safe, efficient, pure Python serialization library.

**Why rPickle?**
- No arbitrary code execution during deserialization
- Handles circular references
- Supports Python 3.15+ features like ``frozendict`` and ``sentinel``
- Zero dependencies

   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Getting Started

   installation
   quickstart
